title: C440
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''C440''''' was a group of three [[Class-C cargo container]]s near the Calamari Cruiser [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']]. During the first phase of the assault by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and according to order by the [[Priest (Secret Order of the Emperor)|Cloaked Figure]], pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] identified their contents and found them to contain stolen Imperial war equipment. They were eventually destroyed along with the cruiser.

==Behind the scenes==
The containers can be destroyed in the first phase of the attack (mission 1:4), but will be found intact in the next mission (1:5).

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
